heading: Kingdom Kids Shop
subheading: Bible lessons, leader guides, and safari curriculum

products.name: VBS Curriculum Kit — Digital

products.name: VBS Curriculum Kit — Print
products.description: Printed & shipped to your door. Director Guide, Skits & Bible Lessons, Games, Crafts & Snacks, Worship & Daily Schedule, and Decorations & Setup. 5-Day Safari Adventure.

products.name: Fear Not: Daniel & the Lions' Den
products.description: A complete Bible lesson exploring Daniel's courage and God's protection. Great for any age group.

products.name: God Leads the Humble
products.description: Discover what it truly means to walk humbly before God in this powerful lesson for kids.

products.name: It is the Lord Who Gives the Victory
products.description: Help kids understand that true victory comes from trusting God, not their own strength.

products.name: Director's Guide
products.description: Everything a VBS director needs — full program overview, daily schedule, volunteer coordination, and setup instructions for a 5-Day Safari Adventure.

products.name: Creation Station Leader Guide
